notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Neto reaches on an error by 3B Rivas, J Lowe scores, O'Hoppe to 3rd, reaches 1st on an error by 3B Rivas

notableEvents.label: Zach Neto reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Neto reaches on an error by 3B Rivas, J Lowe scores, O'Hoppe to 3rd, reaches 1st on an error by 3B Rivas

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Oswald Peraza out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Adam Frazier scores.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Brent Suter picks off Leo Rivas at 1st on throw to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.
